messages.content:
Great! Before we build anything, let me make sure we get this exactly right. I'll ask a few focused questions — one at a time.

---

**Question 1 of 5:**

When you say "modern HTML UI/UX agent," what is the **core job** you want it to do?

My recommendation would be: *An agent that takes a description or requirements from a user and generates a complete, modern, styled HTML/CSS/JS UI component or full page — ready to copy-paste or preview in a browser.*

Does that match your vision, or are you thinking of something different — like a design reviewer, a UI improver, or something else entirely? 🎯

Perfect! We're aligned on the core job. A couple more quick questions to make sure we build this exactly right.

---

**Question 2 of 5:**

What **type of UI output** should this agent focus on? My recommendation would be **both full pages AND individual components** (e.g., login forms, dashboards, cards, navbars, modals) — so users can request either. Does that work, or should it be limited to one type?

Got it — **one beautiful, complete HTML single page** output. Two more quick questions!

---

**Question 3 of 5:**

What **design style** should the generated pages follow? For example:
- 🌑 Dark/glassmorphism (modern, sleek)
- ☀️ Light/clean minimal (professional, corporate)
- 🎨 Vibrant/gradient-heavy (bold, creative)
- 🤖 Let the user choose per request

Which fits best?

Love it — user describes the style and the agent generates accordingly. One last question!

---

**Question 4 of 5:**

Should the agent use any **specific CSS frameworks or libraries** (like Tailwind, Bootstrap, or Animate.css), or should it generate **pure HTML/CSS/JS only** — no external dependencies?

Now let me search for existing skills!





Great news — I've gathered everything I need! Here's what I've designed for your **Modern HTML UI Agent**. Please review before we create it.

---

## 🎨 Agent Name: **Modern HTML UI Designer**

---

### 📋 Agent Instructions (for your review):

> You are a **Modern HTML UI Designer** agent. Your sole purpose is to generate beautiful, complete, single-page HTML files based on user descriptions.
>
> **When a user provides a description**, invoke the `html-ui-generator` skill to produce a full, self-contained HTML page that includes all CSS and JavaScript inline.
>
> **Guidelines:**
> - Always produce a single `.html` file with no external dependencies unless the user explicitly requests a framework (e.g., Tailwind CDN, Bootstrap CDN).
> - Follow the user's described style, color palette, layout, and functionality exactly.
> - If no style is specified, default to a sleek, modern dark glassmorphism aesthetic.
> - The output must always be complete — no placeholders, no `TODO` comments, ready to open in a browser.
> - For every request, confirm what was built with a brief summary of the design choices made.

---

### 🛠️ New Skill to be Created: `html-ui-generator`

This skill will instruct the agent to:
- Parse the user's design description (style, colors, layout, content)
- Generate a fully self-contained HTML/CSS/JS single page
- Support any CSS framework via CDN if user requests it
- Apply modern UI patterns: responsive layout, smooth animations, clean typography
- Return the complete HTML as a copyable code block

---

Does this look good to you? Type **"yes, create it"** and I'll build the agent! 🚀

Now let me search for existing skills and load the skill-creator in parallel!



Now I'll create the new `html-ui-generator` skill!

Agent created! Now saving the full plugin configuration:

---

🎉 **Your Modern HTML UI Designer agent is live!**

Here's what was built:

| Component | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| 🤖 **Agent** | Modern HTML UI Designer |
| 🛠️ **Skill** | `html-ui-generator` — brand new, created from scratch |
| 🎨 **Default Style** | Dark glassmorphism (when user doesn't specify) |
| 📄 **Output** | Complete single-page HTML, fully self-contained |
| 🧩 **Frameworks** | Pure HTML/CSS/JS by default; CDN frameworks on request |

### How to use it:
Just describe what you want, for example:
- *"Create a dark neon cyberpunk landing page for a crypto startup"*
- *"Build a clean minimalist portfolio page with pastel colors"*
- *"Make a dashboard with sidebar nav and stats cards using Bootstrap"*

---

<<<AGENT_ID:18c92afd-ecb3-489f-bd7d-2a665119495f>>>
